productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Light Winter Black Tshirts
description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, long sleeves, graphic print of the brand logo on the front and brand name lettering on the upper backFittingRegularWash careMachine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this black cotton t-shirt from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear. The logo inspired graphic print on the front lends this a strong brand identity, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and canvas shoes and ooze style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
